feedback: The session shows substantial progress in setting up the janitor infrastructure, systemd services, and CI checks, but critical gaps remain. Core janitor modules lack test coverage, the removal of tasks.json and deletion of the git repository introduce potential regressions, and the identified code smells in large files suggest maintainability concerns. Edge cases and comprehensive testing for the new systemd timer and cron integration are not evident.
